          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom enum import Enum\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import Boolean, DateTime, Enum as SAEnum, Integer, JSON, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column\n\n\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):\n    pass\n\n\nclass JobState(str, Enum):\n    QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\n    RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n    FAILED = \"FAILED\"\n    CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\n    DEAD = \"DEAD\"\n\n\nTERMINAL_STATES: set[JobState] = {\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n    JobState.FAILED,\n    JobState.CANCELED,\n    JobState.DEAD,\n}\n\n\nclass IdempotencyStatus(str, Enum):\n    IN_PROGRESS = \"IN_PROGRESS\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n\n\ndef utc_now() -> datetime:\n    return datetime.now(UTC)\n\n\nclass Job(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid4()))\n    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), index=True)\n    payload: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON)\n    state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(SAEnum(JobState, native_enum=False), index=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, index=True)\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, onupdate=utc_now)\n\n    idempotency_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True, index=True)\n    attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n    max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3)\n\n    next_run_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True, index=True)\n    schedule: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True)\n\n    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n\n    queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), default=\"default\", index=True)\n    cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False)\n    lease_expires_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True)\n    last_stream_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=True)\n    enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, index=True)\n    version: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n\n\nclass JobEvent(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, index=True)\n    old_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=True)\n    new_state: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20))\n    message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text)\n    metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n\n\nclass IdempotencyLock(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"idempotency_locks\"\n\n    key: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), primary_key=True)\n    owner_job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    status: Mapped[IdempotencyStatus] = mapped_column(\n        SAEnum(IdempotencyStatus, native_enum=False),\n        default=IdempotencyStatus.IN_PROGRESS,\n    )\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, onupdate=utc_now)\n\n\nclass ScheduleTick(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), index=True)\n    planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), index=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now)\r\n"

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport statistics\nimport time\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport httpx\nimport typer\n\nfrom mini_celery.config import get_settings\nfrom mini_celery.models import TERMINAL_STATES, JobState\n\napp = typer.Typer(no_args_is_help=True, help=\"mini-celery CLI\")\n\n\ndef _parse_payload(payload: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    try:\n        parsed = json.loads(payload)\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:\n        raise typer.BadParameter(f\"invalid JSON payload: {exc}\") from exc\n    if not isinstance(parsed, dict):\n        raise typer.BadParameter(\"payload must be a JSON object\")\n    return parsed\n\n\\REDACTED(\"submit\")\ndef submit(\n    task_type: str = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Task type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option(\"{}\", \"--payload\", help=\"JSON payload\"),\n    queue: str = typer.Option(\"default\", \"--queue\"),\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, \"--max-attempts\", min=1),\n    run_at: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--run-at\", help=\"RFC3339 timestamp\"),\n    idempotency_key: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--idempotency-key\"),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    body: dict[str, Any] = {\n        \"type\": task_type,\n        \"payload\": _parse_payload(payload),\n        \"queue\": queue,\n        \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\n        \"idempotency_key\": idempotency_key,\n    }\n    if run_at:\n        body[\"run_at\"] = run_at\n\n    response = httpx.post(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs\", json=body, timeout=10.0)\n    response.raise_for_status()\n    data = response.json()\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"status\")\ndef status(job_id: str) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    response = httpx.get(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs/{job_id}\", timeout=10.0)\n    response.raise_for_status()\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"list\")\ndef list_jobs(\n    state: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--state\"),\n    task_type: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--type\"),\n    limit: int = typer.Option(20, \"--limit\", min=1, max=100),\n    cursor: str | None = typer.Option(None, \"--cursor\"),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    params = {\n        \"state\": state,\n        \"type\": task_type,\n        \"limit\": limit,\n        \"cursor\": cursor,\n    }\n    filtered = {k: v for k, v in params.items() if v is not None}\n    response = httpx.get(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs\", params=filtered, timeout=10.0)\n    response.raise_for_status()\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"tail-events\")\ndef tail_events(\n    job_id: str,\n    poll_interval: float = typer.Option(1.0, \"--poll-interval\", min=0.1),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    cursor_ts: str | None = None\n\n    while True:\n        params = {\"limit\": 200}\n        if cursor_ts:\n            params[\"cursor_ts\"] = cursor_ts\n\n        response = httpx.get(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs/{job_id}/events\", params=params, timeout=10.0)\n        response.raise_for_status()\n        payload = response.json()\n        events = payload.get(\"items\", [])\n\n        for event in events:\n            typer.echo(json.dumps(event))\n            cursor_ts = event[\"ts\"]\n\n        status_resp = httpx.get(f\"{settings.api_url}/jobs/{job_id}\", timeout=10.0)\n        status_resp.raise_for_status()\n        state = status_resp.json()[\"state\"]\n        if JobState(state) in TERMINAL_STATES:\n            break\n\n        time.sleep(poll_interval)\n\n\nasync def _loadtest_impl(\n    *,\n    api_url: str,\n    total: int,\n    concurrency: int,\n    task_type: str,\n    payload: dict[str, Any],\n    max_attempts: int,\n) -> None:\n    submission_times: dict[str, float] = {}\n    completion_times: dict[str, float] = {}\n    semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrency)\n\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=20.0) as client:\n\n        async def submit_one(index: int) -> None:\n            async with semaphore:\n                idempotency_key = f\"loadtest-{index}-{int(time.time() * 1000)}\"\n                request_body = {\n                    \"type\": task_type,\n                    \"payload\": payload,\n                    \"queue\": \"default\",\n                    \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\n                    \"idempotency_key\": idempotency_key,\n                }\n                t0 = time.perf_counter()\n                response = await client.post(f\"{api_url}/jobs\", json=request_body)\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                job_id = response.json()[\"job_id\"]\n                submission_times[job_id] = t0\n\n        started = time.perf_counter()\n        await asyncio.gather(*[submit_one(i) for i in range(total)])\n        submitted_at = time.perf_counter()\n\n        pending = set(submission_times.keys())\n        while pending:\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.2)\n            for job_id in list(pending):\n                response = await client.get(f\"{api_url}/jobs/{job_id}\")\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                state = JobState(response.json()[\"state\"])\n                if state in TERMINAL_STATES:\n                    completion_times[job_id] = time.perf_counter()\n                    pending.remove(job_id)\n\n        ended = time.perf_counter()\n\n    submit_throughput = total / max(submitted_at - started, 1e-9)\n    end_to_end_throughput = total / max(ended - started, 1e-9)\n    latencies = [completion_times[job_id] - submission_times[job_id] for job_id in submission_times]\n\n    def percentile(values: list[float], p: float) -> float:\n        if not values:\n            return 0.0\n        ordered = sorted(values)\n        idx = min(len(ordered) - 1, int(round((len(ordered) - 1) * p)))\n        return ordered[idx]\n\n    report = {\n        \"total_jobs\": total,\n        \"submit_throughput_jobs_per_sec\": round(submit_throughput, 3),\n        \"end_to_end_throughput_jobs_per_sec\": round(end_to_end_throughput, 3),\n        \"latency_seconds\": {\n            \"min\": round(min(latencies), 4),\n            \"mean\": round(statistics.mean(latencies), 4),\n            \"p50\": round(percentile(latencies, 0.50), 4),\n            \"p95\": round(percentile(latencies, 0.95), 4),\n            \"max\": round(max(latencies), 4),\n        },\n    }\n    typer.echo(json.dumps(report, indent=2))\n\n\\REDACTED(\"loadtest\")\ndef loadtest(\n    total: int = typer.Option(100, \"--total\", min=1),\n    concurrency: int = typer.Option(10, \"--concurrency\", min=1),\n    task_type: str = typer.Option(\"sleep\", \"--task-type\"),\n    payload: str = typer.Option('{\"seconds\":0.05}', \"--payload\"),\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, \"--max-attempts\", min=1),\n) -> None:\n    settings = get_settings()\n    asyncio.run(\n        _loadtest_impl(\n            api_url=settings.api_url,\n            total=total,\n            concurrency=concurrency,\n            task_type=task_type,\n            payload=_parse_payload(payload),\n            max_attempts=max_attempts,\n        )\n    )\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    app()\r\n"
        },
